name: Mississippi Mud
recipeInstructions:
1) Cream together the sugar and shortening, then add the eggs one at a time, beating well after each addition. Add the flour, cocoa, vanilla, and salt, creaming well. If desired, stir in the pecans.
2) Pour the batter into a greased and floured 9-inch by 13-inch cake pan and bake at 350°F for 30 minutes. Remove from the oven and spread the marshmallow fluff evenly over the top of the cake. Return to the oven for an additional minute or until the fluff is spreadable.
3) Spread the frosting over the fluff and refrigerate until ready to serve.
